title: The Cleaner's Tookit
description: This Mod Adds Soap, A Hammer And Bug Repellent
body:
This Mod Makes It So You Can Clean Any Thing Using Either Soap, A Hammer Or Bug Repellent.

The Soap Can Clean All Moss Blocks This Is The Recipe To Craft It.

![Soap-Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BYXwzxrH/images/50aaa0545268c5f4b6977847bff9afb2052459b8.png)

The Hammer Can Fix Any Broken Blocks This is How You Craft It.

![Hammer-Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BYXwzxrH/images/37d7259a0d33912c65a82047a3238ee3b66b5df8.png)

The Bug Repellent Can De-Infest Blocks Here's The Recipe.

![Bug-Repellent-Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BYXwzxrH/images/5cd6a30ad6deaa499d4a3961ff137e3291bd82ae.png)
